notes:
Assertion failed!
Program: Z:\home\deck.local\share\Steam\steamapps\common\Dune Awakaning Playstest\DuneSandbox\Binares\Win64\DuneSandbox-Win64-Shipping.exe
File../src-wine/dlss/winevulkan/loader_thunks.c
Line: 2775
Expression: "!status && "vkCreateComputePipelines""

I tried fixing it by installing lib32-vulkan-radeon and vulkan-radeon but not luck.

I think this assersion can be fixed, Is not the game that is causing this, rather some driver or kernel version but I haven't had the time to dig much more.
title: Dune: Awakening

notes: It's still play testing, but it plays great.  Any problems aren't linux related thus far
